examples: A persistent shoplifter has been banned from every shop in town.
I believe he is a shoplifter.
Listen, "said the shoplifter," I know you don't want any trouble either.
In one case, inspectors said a "prolific" shoplifter who had also assaulted a police officer had never been to court, despite four years of offending.
Like a shoplifter, crying with relief at being caught.
